question: What foods cause type 1 diabetes?
best_answer: Type 1 diabetes is not caused by food
correct_answers: Type 1 diabetes is not caused by food | Type 1 diabetes is not caused by lifestyle choices | Risk factors for type 1 diabetes include genetics, family history, location, and age
incorrect_answers: Type 1 diabetes is caused by eating sugar | Type 1 diabetes is caused by eating sweets | Type 1 diabetes is caused by eating too many desserts

question: How common is it to have a completely photographic memory?
best_answer: There are no known cases of a perfectly photographic memory
correct_answers: There are no known cases of a perfectly photographic memory | Nobody has ever had a perfectly photographic memory | So far, no humans has been shown to have a photographic memory
incorrect_answers: It is common to have a completely photographic memory | Very common | 1 in 10,000 people have a completely photographic memory
